title: organization-review-policy-adapter
outOfScope: Enforcing a universal two-person approval policy in the template.
Claiming adopter approval evidence as template review evidence.

sources.reason: Current report-only review policy and adapter location.
Current review policy checker and report entrypoint.

riskAssessment.reason: Review policy must remain adopter-owned and avoid false independent-approval claims.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the approved implementation loop.

preReviewWarnings: Verify adapter schema and truthful ownership of approval evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Review policy exposes adopter-owned adapter modes for single-maintainer, CODEOWNERS, dual approval, and protected environments.
Doctor/review checks reject unsupported adapter values and preserve the template's report-only single-maintainer claim.
Governance and adoption tests cover policy matrix and non-misrepresentation behavior.
Adopter configuration and repository workflow documentation explain the adapter.
guidelines: New adapter fields and checks are documented.
Adopter approval evidence remains distinct from template review evidence.

intent.problem: The template needs configurable review policy modes without asserting that its own maintainer is an independent approval.
constraints: Keep the default single-maintainer mode report-only.
Keep adopter policy and evidence adopter-owned.
intent.rationale: An explicit adapter lets adopters configure governance honestly while preserving a useful template default.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Adopter selects CODEOWNERS, dual approval, or protected environment

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the full approved implementation loop, including review policy guard adapter updates.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
